The mission

Every 30 seconds an American loses money to fraud.
We built the AI to stop it.

About me

THE FOUNDER

I'm Aman Kumar Mahto — entrepreneur, technologist, and the founder behind Sentinel Finance AI. My journey into AI-driven financial security started with a personal experience that nearly cost my family everything: a scammer using an AI clone of a relative's voice to target my grandmother.

That moment ignited a mission. I spent the next year building the AI infrastructure, advisory model, and legal framework to protect Americans from fraud that traditional financial institutions are not equipped to stop.

Today, Sentinel Finance AI stands at the intersection of artificial intelligence, financial security, and human advisory — a platform that works 24/7 to intercept fraud before it happens, not after.
